description: Repo-tracked protocol bundle for the planner/optimizer/reviewer architecture used by the ot-team CLI.

roles.purpose: Frame goals, constraints, and an executable iteration plan.
Improve the candidate plan or artifact against measurable quality targets.
Gate completion, document risks, and decide whether another loop is required.

contracts.handoff_format: goal -> plan -> optimization delta -> review gate
contracts.stop_condition: reviewer approves or the workflow hits a declared escalation threshold

recommended_commands: uv run ot-team start autoresearch --workspace desk-alpha --skill my-skill --adapter codex
